proof:
simp only [sub_zero] at hh
    have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1)
    have tri : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      calc |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
           _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) ≤ 3)]
    exact le_trans tri (add_le_add_left hh' _)
successful_attempts:
simp only [sub_zero] at hh
    have hh' : |h| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hh δ_le1)
    have tri : |3 * x + h| ≤ 3 * |x| + |h| := by
      calc |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
           _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) ≤ 3)]
    exact le_trans tri (add_le_add_left hh' _)
